creator: gnuandbsdguy@gmail.com
text:
Hello There!

I would like to report another bug in FreeBSD 14.LMMS is not added in the packages on FreeBSD 14 AMD64, but also that's not the only thing. I tried to compile the port myself using the FreeBSD ports it works and also it makes the binary but when I want to use "make install" it give me an error message (I don't have the error at the moment because I am using my Debian Linux laptop) but it is necessary i will add the error message later.

Thanks for all your help!
